prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (G63B) 1.8L turbocharged inline-4 with forged internals (8.5:1 compression, billet crankshaft by Tomei, Carrillo H-beam rods, and JE 87mm forged pistons) paired with a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing, 56 trim compressor) and custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS

Drivetrain: Reinforced AWD transfer case with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (front and rear), upgraded driveshafts by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly), and a Quaife ATB helical differential for the center differential

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 8kg/mm front springs, 7kg/mm rear springs) with custom-spec front camber plates by Whiteline and rear toe arms by SuperPro for aggressive alignment (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear camber)
estetica: Body: Rare Mitsubishi Motors Japan (MMJ) 'Cordia GSR Group A' widebody conversion kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper lip, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented, 30% weight reduction)
Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 16x9 +15 front and 16x10 +25 rear (ET +15/+25) with 225/50R16 and 245/45R16 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, mounted on custom 5x114.3 to 4x114.3 hubcentric spacers by WPC

Interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (90s JDM Group A spec) with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom roll cage by Custom Cages (MIG-welded 4130 chromoly, bolt-in design), and a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel with a Works Bell quick-release hub
